semantic.role: Database infrastructure and persistence layer documentation
responsibilities: Implementation of the Database class for connection state management
Generic query method for SQL-like command execution
Concrete data persistence implementation for the application

English.purpose: This document defines the database infrastructure layer of the ArchSpine system, specifically the Database class that manages low-level connection state and provides a generic query interface for executing SQL-like commands.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers working on the persistence layer of ArchSpine, particularly those responsible for database connection management, query execution, and ensuring reliable data storage. It serves as a reference for understanding how the system interacts with its underlying database.
key_takeaways: The Database class is the core component for managing database connections
A generic query method provides a unified interface for SQL-like command execution
The document covers the full connection lifecycle including connect and disconnect operations
This layer serves as the concrete implementation of data persistence for the application

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 系统的数据库基础设施层，具体描述了管理底层连接状态的 Database 类，以及提供通用查询接口来执行类似 SQL 的命令。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向负责 ArchSpine 持久化层的开发人员，特别是那些负责数据库连接管理、查询执行以及确保可靠数据存储的开发者。它作为理解系统如何与底层数据库交互的参考文档。
key_takeaways: Database 类是管理数据库连接的核心组件
通用查询方法为执行类似 SQL 的命令提供了统一接口
文档涵盖了完整的连接生命周期，包括连接和断开操作
该层作为应用程序数据持久化的具体实现
